changeSet.author: pkomena
changeSet.comment: Ajouter au panel ECB-Crachat : - Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Polynucléaires - Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Polynucléaires - Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Lymphocytes
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.panel_item (id, panel_id, lastupdated, test_id) SELECT nextval('panel_item_seq'), p.id, now(), t.id FROM clinlims.panel p JOIN clinlims.test t ON t.name IN ( 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Gram - Polynucléaires', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Polynucléaires', 'Microscopie - Frottis Coloration Giemsa - Lymphocytes' ) WHERE p.name = 'ECB-Crachat' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.panel_item pi WHERE pi.panel_id = p.id AND pi.test_id = t.id );
